question: Is the basketball player from the donor image clearly visible, wearing the red 'DRAGONS' jersey with number 23?
Is the player holding the basketball above his head in the specific shooting pose from the reference image?
Are the player's feet clearly separated from the ground to depict the requested mid-jump action?
Is the player positioned at the free-throw line area of the court?
Is the player oriented facing towards the basketball hoop?
Is the player scaled realistically relative to the basketball hoop height and the surrounding fence?
Is there a visible cast shadow on the court surface corresponding to the player?
Is the cast shadow detached from the player's feet, showing a gap that correctly corresponds to the height of the jump?
Does the direction of the player's cast shadow align with the existing shadows in the scene (slanting towards the right)?
Does the lighting on the player match the warm, golden-hour color temperature of the outdoor court, replacing the cool/flat indoor lighting?
Do the highlights and shading on the player's body align with the directional sunlight of the scene (source coming from the left/rear)?
Is the player cleanly composited without visible halos, jagged edges, or residual pixels from the original indoor background?
Is the basketball hoop and transparent backboard preserved intact without distortion or occlusion by the player?
Are the background elements (chain-link fence, trees, buildings) and court markings preserved without warping or artifacts?
Is the basketball spherical and the player's anatomy (limbs, hands) distinct and undistorted?
